system.name: LoanTriage Assistant
system.intended_purpose: Assist human loan officers by ranking incoming consumer credit applications by estimated default risk to prioritise manual review.
system.deployment_context: Runs as an internal REST microservice behind the bank's case-management UI; CPU inference, batch and on-demand.

governance.owner: Director of Model Risk, Greenway Credit Analytics
governance.oversight: Every model-flagged decline is routed to a human loan officer who must record an independent rationale before action.

out_of_scope: Fully automated approval or denial without human review
Use on small-business or commercial lending products

measure.test_data: Stratified 2025 holdout of 180k anonymised applications, time-split from training to avoid leakage.
limitations: Not validated on thin-file applicants (<3 tradelines)
Degrades when unemployment data is stale beyond 60 days

mitigations: Confidence-band abstention routes low-confidence cases to senior review
